rulings.Case Title: TALAL MUHAWIEH et al VS. KEN G. WEI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Award Of Attorneys' Fees
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 20, 2014, line 1. DEFENDANTs KEN WEI and KGW ENTERPRISE LLC's Motion For Award Of Attorneys' Fees Continued to December 23, 2014. On Court's own motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DIANA D. SAM VS. CATALINA BOYKIN et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 20, 2014, line 2. CROSS DEFENDANTs DIANA SAM and MYRON MOSKOVITZ's DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT Sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer to the first cause of action is sustained with leave amend for Plaintiff to separately allege (1) a cause of action for breach of contract and (2) a cause of action for breach of covenant of good faith a fair dealing, specifying damages caused by each breach. Demurrer to the sixth, seventh and eight causes of action for fraud is sustained without leave to amend. Cross-complaint failed to allege damages element of this cause of action after a leave to amend to do so was granted. Demurrer to the elder abuse cause of action is overruled. Moving party does not cite any authority for the proposition that CC 3343 requirements are applicable to the elder abuse claim. Elder abuse claim is sufficiently alleged under Bounds v. Superior Court (2014) 229 Cal.App.4th 468. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DIANA D. SAM VS. CATALINA BOYKIN et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 20, 2014, line 2. CROSS DEFENDANTs CENTURY 21 REALTY ALLIANCE and YING HE's DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT Overruled in part and sustained in part. Demurer is overruled as to the constructive fraud cause of action. This cause of action is sufficiently alleged per CC 1573. Demurer is overruled as to the elder abuse. This cause of action is sufficiently alleged per Bounds v. Superior Court (2014) 229 Cal.App.4th 468. Demurer is overruled as to the IIED cause of action. Complaint sufficiently alleges facts to support the "extreme and outrageous" element. Demurrer to the 12th cause of action for rescission is sustained without leave to amend; no opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DIANA D. SAM VS. CATALINA BOYKIN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 20, 2014, line 2. CROSS DEFENDANTs CENTURY 21 REALTY ALLIANCE and YING HE's MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT GRANTED without leave to amend. Attorney's fees are not recoverable in this action under paragraph 15th of the Listing Agreement. Tort of another doctrine is not applicable to the case at bar. = (501/REQ)
